concerns.text: T076 and T077 are dependent (checksums must be computed *before* they can be included in the manifest). The current ordering does not enforce this dependency, potentially leading to incorrect manifests. T077 MUST follow T076.
T011 (CI workflow) depends on T009 (configuration constants). The CI workflow needs the deterministic seed to be set *before* it can reliably run.  T011 should be placed after T009.

The 'Checkpoint' text after Phase 2 is a bit vague. It states US1 can begin *after* T005-T010, but doesn't clearly state that T011 can proceed in parallel with US1 *after* T005-T010. Clarify the parallelization opportunities.

The 'Tests for User Story 1' section lists tests (T014-T016) that depend on tasks (T017-T027). The ordering within this section should be adjusted to reflect the dependencies. Tests should come *after* the tasks they test.
Similar to Phase 3, the 'Tests for User Story 2' section (T029-T030) should be reordered to ensure tests follow the tasks they validate.

T061 (power analysis) depends on T024 (inconsistency validator) to have generated data. The power analysis needs the output of the inconsistency validator to determine if N≥300. T061 must follow T024.
T081 (real-world validation set creation) and T082 (real-world validation evaluation) are dependent. The evaluation cannot occur before the dataset is created. T082 must follow T081.
